title: campanula glomerata subsp. subcapitata
intro: Campanula glomerata subsp. subcapitata, also known as the clustered bellflower or subcapitata bellflower, is a plant species within the Campanulaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Campanula glomerata subsp. subcapitata include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically dried and used in teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
